CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip Kilduff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FEDEX Customer Information Services, Inc.
Andre Todd, the Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Ming Li.
Default was entered against defendant on May 7, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 7, 2008.

Exhibit 1 - FEDEX Statement of Account dated 10/31/07---------------------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Declaration of Jay Tenebaum in Suport of Calculation of Interest----------ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff FEDEX Customer Information Service, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Ming Li as follows:

Damages/Principal - $35,681.43.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,776.09.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $380.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $35,637.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
